programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis shares news of his upcoming travels with his long-suffering wife; Larry presses George Washington for answers.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Daniel (Daniel Travis) and Susan (Blanchard Ryan) embark on a tropical vacation with their scuba-diving certifications in tow. During a group dive, the two separate themselves from the others to dive a little deeper. An incorrect head-count suggests the entire group has returned, so the boat departs. When the pair surfaces, they make out a vessel in the distance, but it does not immediately set in that they have been left behind. With sharks lurking beneath, their survival chances grow smaller.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Previously thought to be extinct, a massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific. With time running out, a visionary oceanographer recruits rescue diver Jonas Taylor to save the crew and the sea itself from an unimaginable threat -- a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the Megalodon.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Haunted by a traumatic experience from the past, Adelaide grows increasingly concerned that something bad is going to happen. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis shares news of his upcoming travels with his long-suffering wife; Larry presses George Washington for answers.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As Natalie Portman, Kara Nortman, and Julie Uhrman begin the process of building Angel City Football Club from the ground up ahead of its first season in the NWSL, they realize bucking the status quo can be a tightrope walk.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: As players and staff deal with the stress of living up to the club's ambitious goals, ACFC kicks off their inaugural NWSL season at home in front of a vibrant, star-studded crowd.

programme.title: Angel City
programme.desc: Tensions mount as ACFC searches for solutions in their roster while fighting for a playoff spot during the final weeks of their inaugural season.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Stand Up & Shout: Songs From a Philly High School
programme.desc: Students at Philadelphia's Hill-Freedman World Academy work with local musicians to create an album of powerful, original songs that captures both the challenging times they're living in and the joy that music brings.

programme.title: South to Black Power
programme.desc: Author and columnist Charles M. Blow calls for African Americans to migrate to the South to upend the political power structure and reclaim the land and culture they left behind.

programme.title: The Soul of America
programme.desc: Writer, journalist, historian and presidential biographer Jon Meacham offers his timely and invaluable insights into the United States' current political and historical moment by examining its past struggles with racism, sexism and xenophobia.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
programme.desc: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace. Eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she's returned to them. However, what should be a joyful reunion soon turns into a living nightmare as she starts to transform into something truly horrifying.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: How We Get Free
programme.desc: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

programme.title: Music Box: Yacht Rock: A Dockumentary
programme.desc: Chronicling the emergence and popularity of the West Coast, soft rock pop culture epitomized by musical artists such as Christopher Cross, Michael McDonald, Kenny Loggins, Steely Dan and Toto.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Scorpion's Revenge
programme.desc: The champions of Outworld and Earthrealm fight to the death in a brutal tournament that determines the fate of Earth.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
programme.desc: The heroes must travel to Outworld to defend Earthrealm as Scorpion searches for the ancient Kamidogu before it's used to resurrect the One Being.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Snow Blind
programme.desc: When Kano and Black Dragon mercenaries become determined to take over Earthrealm, undisciplined Kenshi seeks tutelage from retired Kuai Liang to stop Kano from decimating all of Earthrealm.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Cage Match
programme.desc: Action superstar Johnny Cage squares off against a sinister secret society that's plotting a nefarious scheme. However, the brutal fight against the bloodthirsty warriors of the Netherrealm is just the beginning.

programme.desc: The key players look to connive and even kill their way into being named "His or Her Majesty."

programme.title: Transaction
programme.desc: Lively sitcom. Simon and his team meet behind Liv's back at the local pub to discuss her future employment as Simon's ex-wife and Pellocks' HR rep Frieda tries to spark a mutiny - meanwhile, Liv mans the store alone until a mysterious teenager arrives to rob the place and Liv learns to reconnect with her childish side.

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Sitcom set in a charmingly dysfunctional police training college. When Geeta is voted Year Rep against her will, she tries to back out of her responsibilities and become 'unchosen' by resorting to subterfuge - elsewhere, Bob and Julie get a shock when Cunningham plans to merge their two superintendent positions into one. With a redundancy looming, Julie tries to persuade Bob to retire - meanwhile, the recruits are introduced to the Code of Ethics and which types of misconduct can lead to dismissal, and Daz's frustration builds as he undergoes his first anger management session with the formidable Melanie. As Julie prepares a presentation to bring Cunningham up to speed on Paul's role as a double agent - with Bob impressively operating the flipchart - Aunty Nooch urges Paul to get valuable intel while he is under pressure from Julie to spy in the other direction, Connor assists Danni with the writing of her wedding vows, and Daz's new anger controlling techniques are severely tested.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Meredith becomes a bat mitzvah, Bronwyn is confronted for spilling Whitney and Angie's secrets after breaking their trust, Mary tries to work through her issues with Meredith while grappling with personal issues at home, and a party takes a surprising turn when a hair argument arises.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Shannon and Vicki head to St Louis for their live show tour, Heather and Alexis attend the GLAAD Awards, Tamra and Katie's daughters bond over similar childhood experiences, Jenn hosts a poolside party where Alexis is cryptic about a new development in the ongoing lawsuit, and Emily's confrontation of Heather for feeling singled out during Heather's fashion show leads to an explosive encounter.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Nicole from Kent is given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five men behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Nicole will only be having dinner with three of them. She will choose her dates based on the menus she most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will she want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of reality TV, girl groups, American history and hockey.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Amy's attempt to mediate between her cousin Harry and new pal Bobby ended in a row at the curry house that got more heated than her vindaloo - now Bobby's not just got beef with Harry, but Amy too. Bobby thinks that she should have had stuck up for him when Harry denied cheating - can Amy salvage the friendship, or will she back away from Bob out of loyalty to her cousin? Amy's not the only mate stuck in the middle - Courtney and Chloe M are on good terms with Clelia, but there is no love lost between her and their besties Chloe B and Amber. Can they persuade both parties that it's time to let bygones be bygones? Elsewhere, Ella's had a busy few weeks - not only did she drop the bombshell that she'd snogged Pete, but she also fell out with best mate Kelsey, who took her to task for kissing a guy she liked. The Pete situation seems to be in hand, with them agreeing to be nothing more than flirty friends... but she and Kelsey haven't spoken since their argument, and Ella is gutted.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. Elsewhere, Britani makes a new announcement as Bronwyn comes to terms with Gwen's decision about her grandparents.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Ballroom legend Mary Mallan returns to Allsbrooke and reignites a decades-old rivalry with Grandma Pat. They settle it with a ballroom showdown, each training an unlikely partner - Pat pairs with a reluctant Christopher, while Mary trains Reece. As rehearsals grow brutal, Aimee and Mia-Louise turn the feud into a school craze with merch, rumours and betting. Beneath the rivalry, old wounds surface as Pat reveals abandoned dance dreams, a pregnancy that ended her career, and her belief Mary betrayed her. Christopher commits as he realises what the contest means to Pat, while Reece helps Mary confront life beyond trophies. On show night, both dances move the crowd before Pat and Christopher win. Backstage, Mary and Pat discover the betrayal never happened and finally heal.

programme.title: Family Guy

Life is great for the Griffins until Peter's new high profile goes to his head. Meanwhile, Stewie becomes a sports bookie.

Elsewhere, Gatsby and Dani are going strong after a string of successful dates, and Gatsby is ready to step things up by introducing her to best mates Dan and Diags.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The Mexico trip continues as the ladies set sail on a yacht excursion, Lisa updates the group on life with John and Henry, and Britani takes offence at the lack of enthusiasm over her latest announcement - meanwhile, Bronwyn reveals some dark truths about her marriage and is surprised by Heather's grace and Lisa's lack of support. After Mary arrives at the trip, the ladies come together for a beautiful VIDA dinner where Meredith learns that her late-night antics have fuelled Britani with fresh gossip and Angie and Bronwyn confront Lisa for a dramatic conclusion to the evening.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Tamra reveals more surprising information about Ryan that leaves Jenn to question her friendship with Tamra once again, Emily and Heather discuss body image, and Shannon hosts a tea party to reveal that she's taking almost everyone on a trip to London to celebrate her 60th birthday - however, Alexis learns that her olive branch to Shannon didn't work out the way she intended and is cordially not invited.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Operations Lead Nick is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five women behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Nick will only be having dinner with three of them. He will choose his dates based on the menus he most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will he want to see for seconds.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal is joined by 2019 Love Islanders Anton and Belle, Ovie and India, and Chris and Harley as he hosts a very special edition of the game show - the three couples go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize for charity.

programme.title: The Floor US

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. programme.title: The Floor US

This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. After a pregnancy scare, Peter reluctantly agrees to get a vasectomy. But after the operation, Peter's sex drive becomes non-existent. Meanwhile, Stewie's half-brother and rival Bertram confronts him, and they declare an all-out war for control over the playground.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of a woman is pulled from the River Thames after her car is found in suspicious circumstances, the victim's abusive ex-husband seems to be the prime suspect. The pair had been involved in a bitter custody battle over their teenage daughter Holly. Then the investigation takes a strange turn, as Ronnie and Sam discover that Holly was in fact infatuated with her mother's new husband. Could a teenage girl really be so calculating and capable of killing her own mother?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: After a break-in, a frail elderly woman named Jenny Moran is found dead in her flat by her neighbour. Tipped off by the victim's granddaughter Connie, the investigation focuses on the old lady's live-in carer Cecile Bakama, who is promptly arrested. Cecile blames Connie when the post mortem confirms that starvation was the cause of death. Ronnie and Sam find this hard to believe at first, until they discover that Connie stands to profit in her grandmother's will. Connie's brief Vijay Prasad argues that there is no proof that starvation killed Jenny Moran, as she suffered from multiple illnesses. Jake is adamant that Connie was the only real family Jenny had, and she left her to die. As Vijay goes on the offensive and Jake denies his claims, Connie makes a startling confession that lays bare the strength of her faith.

programme.desc: Crime drama series about the police who investigate crime, and the Crown Prosecution Service who prosecute the offenders. They soon discover that the truth lies with the baby's biological mother, ex-drug addict Ruth Pendle.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the two vital parts of the criminal justice system - the police who investigate crime, and the Crown Prosecution Service who bring the offenders to trial. DS Ronnie Brooks is joined by his new partner DS Joe Hawkins as they investigate the death of jeweller Harry Bernstein, whose body is found minus his hands and teeth. The dead man's wife Lindsay, her lover David, and a former business associate of Harry's are all suspects, but the case then takes an unexpected turn when Harry's severed hands are delivered in a box to his sister Rebecca's house and accompanied by a short written message - 'Not Guilty'. Could this be because Rebecca is on the jury for the trial of Dale Horgan, a drug dealer and murderer whom Ronnie has been trying to nail for years? In court, Jacob Thorne and Kate Barker are faced with formidable defence barrister Eleanor Richmond, but will Ronnie's evidence be enough to convict?

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: Two-part crime drama. When Susan Harrow fails to return home from work, her mother Bibi reports her missing - her body is discovered six days later on a waste ground at the back of a nightclub. Susan has been mutilated and sexually assaulted with an arrowhead weapon, and so a murder case is launched and an AMIP squad headed by Detective Superintendent Walker is called in to investigate - the only lead they have is witness Shiree Moyer, who saw Susan on the night she went missing talking to a man in a white van.

programme.desc: US robot combat series. The pressure is on with the Round of 32 getting nearer and time running out for teams to make lasting impressions and prove that they have tournament-qualifying talent - the card this time features an eclectic mix of hard-hitting favourites like Copperhead and Deathroll, struggling mid-tier sleepers like Mammoth and Kraken, and an electric Main Event between two bots who are both desperate for a big win in the form of Series 5 runner-up Whiplash and the Brits with Bite and their bot Monsoon.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Robin loses a valuable painting and racks of expensive vintage wine in a poker game against the publisher of a men's magazine, he tries to save face by gambling his entire estate on the outcome of a softball match.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. TC visits Detroit, where he's forced to take part in a bare-knuckle boxing bout to repay a debt to an old friend.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Tough London criminal Frank Egan executes Willie Ferguson outside a London pub, but the only witness denies in court that he saw Egan commit the crime - when Dempsey and Makepeace investigate, they discover that Egan and his old friend Archie McAllister have further plans... and that murder is not the only thing on their minds.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken finds himself investigating an insurance swindle when an Argentine polo team comes to Woodcote Park, and Rocky finds himself in charge of a valuable painting.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Richard and Sharron seem to be safe after their latest assignment protecting a foreign leader, but they are soon proven wrong.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Eight teams including Cobalt, Captain Shrederator, and local Las Vegas favourite Jackpot throw down the gauntlet to battle for a solitary spot in the Tournament of Champions - if they survive three gruelling rounds to win the fourth Slugfest, they'll face three BattleBots champions and all the Slugfest winners for a chance to win the Golden Bolt.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas attempts to help a Saigon disc jockey who is trying to trace her missing ex-fiance and has become the victim of abusive phone calls.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas, Higgins, TC and Rick get stranded on an island at Christmas and set about making the best of their new home, but they are unaware that a US Navy officer is about to start using it for target practice.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Two rival underworld gangs prove to be a test for the mismatched duo - as Dempsey gambles in a world where extortion, murder and kidnapping are the rules of the game, Makepeace has to save more than just his skin.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material into the UK.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions have to race against time when London is threatened with devastation by a criminal organisation who have stolen a nuclear submarine with live devices on board.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur and Terry get involved with a small-time crook who manages to steal a suitcase full of money - Arthur soon realises that the notes are suspect, but he still manages to be out of pocket when the situation comes to a dramatic climax.

programme.title: Aussie Pickers
programme.desc: The first episode of the Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series that follows two salvage experts scouring Down Under for forgotten treasures in attics, backyards and sheds. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald, who earn a living by restoring abandoned relics to their former glory, visit Jim Crocker, a collector and junkyard owner who specialises in Furphy water carts.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Adventurer and motorcycle enthusiast Henry Cole returns with the motorbike magazine show as he learns how to trials ride with 12-time world champion Dougie Lampkin and has a go at the fine art of sidecar riding - we also get a potted history of the crash helmet and check the progress of another bike restoration where Pete the restorer may have stitched Henry up with another two-wheel basket case.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Last year, as Alaskan temperatures rose, flowing ice from the Yukon River nearly wiped out an entire village. Now, the DOT are racing to stop an overflow that could take out the Dalton and its truckers with it. As drivers race to rack up loads in the Dash for the Cash, they're forced to team up for safety.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Discover how one firm makes the wheelbarrows that helped rebuild Britain, then visit the family farm making jam for the Queen's breakfast table.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais' classic comedy-drama series about a group of British builders in search of employment. Ally sends Dennis back to Newcastle to collect some documents, but Dennis doesn't realise that this is actually a pretext to smuggle cash into Spain - meanwhile, Barry finally puts his foot down with Hazel and takes decisive action regarding their wedding plans.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. British bot Beta tries to bash itself through the impenetrable armour of Black Dragon - the Brazilian bot that's never been knocked out - fellow UK brawler Cobalt aims to continue its strong run through the qualifying rounds, and sparks fly as a bot dies in a shocking Main Event featuring a ferocious clash of titans.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas attempts to help a Saigon disc jockey who is trying to trace her missing ex-fiance and has become the victim of abusive phone calls.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas, Higgins, TC and Rick get stranded on an island at Christmas and set about making the best of their new home, but they are unaware that a US Navy officer is about to start using it for target practice.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Two rival underworld gangs prove to be a test for the mismatched duo - as Dempsey gambles in a world where extortion, murder and kidnapping are the rules of the game, Makepeace has to save more than just his skin.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material into the UK.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions have to race against time when London is threatened with devastation by a criminal organisation who have stolen a nuclear submarine with live devices on board.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. It's semi-final time as the four remaining machines of mayhem face each other in the knockout stage of the competition - two victories separate them from their prize of a place in the Champion of Champions tournament and the chance to win the coveted Golden Bolt.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas befriends a visiting 11-year-old prince whose father was killed by terrorists now threatening the boy's life.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas sets out to solve a murder and jewel theft at a party on the Masters estate, but his efforts are complicated when a delusional Higgins becomes convinced that he's a famous Shakespearean actor.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Dempsey and Makepeace investigate the theft of a small van containing studio equipment and discover that there is more to the robbery than they first thought.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken spends the night with Rebecca before going looking for her missing husband - however, things do not go according to plan when the man is found.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Intruders break into the offices of Nemesis and obtain information that puts Richard's life in danger.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Terry is assigned to be a bodyguard for a Middle Eastern banker who is so nervous that he insists on carrying a gun.

programme.title: Aussie Pickers
programme.desc: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series that follows a group of salvage experts scouring Down Under for forgotten relics in attics, backyards and sheds. The Pickers get a chance to peruse collector Mingo's stock of vintage Indian Trail and Harley Davidson motorcycles.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: The second leg of their UK tour sees Ali and Bobby attempt to catch a monster shark weighing over 400 pounds from just off the north Devon coast - and succeed in hooking the biggest specimen they've ever seen as they have to tag team on the rod to try to get the sea beast to the boat. The boys then venture to Norfolk in pursuit of Britain's biggest freshwater predator, the wels catfish, where the duo's mission is to catch a giant over 50 pounds while chef Daniel Clifford pays the lads another visit for a bank side cook-along.

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as celebrity contestants face the greatest quiz team in the world in the form of the Sinnerman, the Beast, the Governess, the Menace, the Vixen and the Dark Destroyer. Omid Djalili, Richard Whitehead, Jenny Eclair and Clive Mantle try to win big money for their chosen charities in this edition of the show... but can anyone beat the Chasers?

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is Stephen 'The Bullet' Bunting, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The residents of town stand at a crossroads unlike any they've faced before as Boyd sets a daring, and dangerous, plan in motion.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: Rings
programme.desc: A young woman (Matilda Lutz) becomes worried about her boyfriend (Alex Roe) when he explores a dark subculture surrounding a mysterious videotape said to kill the watcher seven days after he has viewed it. She sacrifices herself to save her boyfriend and in doing so makes a horrifying discovery: there is a movie within the movie that no one has ever seen before.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror
programme.desc: Chiller about a family who is terrorized by supernatural forces when they move into a new house in New York State which was the scene of a recent mass killing and the home of an 18th-century satanist. When swarms of flies appear from nowhere and the pipes and walls begin to ooze slime and blood, they call on a local priest to exorcise the evil spirits.

programme.title: Sex Life
programme.desc: Getting one's chakra energies on with sex magic; bringing intimacy into the 21st century; bedroom tips with resident sex experts Amp and Chris.

This expansive period drama follows two childhood friends in northern Italy during the early 20th century. Alfredo Berlinghieri (Robert De Niro) and Olmo Dalcò (Gérard Depardieu) grow up as close companions despite their class differences. However, they drift apart as adults, Alfredo embracing his landowning heritage and Olmo championing workers' rights. As the years go by, they see the rise of fascism in their country, and eventually their values find them directly in conflict.

programme.title: Lifeforce
programme.desc: When a space mission involving American and British astronauts encounters an alien craft, the humanoids within are brought aboard the shuttle. Back on Earth, one of the extraterrestrials, who appears to be a gorgeous woman (Mathilda May), proceeds to suck the life force out of various Londoners, turning the town into a city of roaming half-dead people. When Tom Carlsen (Steve Railsback), a surviving astronaut, realizes what is happening, he sets out to stop the ruthless alien presence.

programme.title: Mulholland Falls
programme.desc: In the desert near Los Angeles, a beautiful woman named Allison Pond (Jennifer Connelly) is found murdered. A special investigative unit led by hard-edged detective Max Hoover (Nick Nolte) is brought in when it looks like the victim may have ties to a secret military program. But Hoover has his own secret: Unbeknown to his adoring wife (Melanie Griffith), Allison is his ex-mistress, and her friend Jimmy Fields (Andrew McCarthy) has secretly filmed pornographic evidence of their affair.

programme.title: The Lookout
programme.desc: Chris (Joseph Gordon-Levitt), a star athlete, has the world at his feet. Then a devastating car accident leaves him with brain damage and his bright future dimmed. He takes a job as a bank janitor and must write everything down in a small notepad in order to remember. Some former schoolmates lure Chris into their inner circle and rope him into helping them carry out a heist at the bank.

programme.title: Gorky Park
programme.desc: Soviet detective Arkady Renko (William Hurt) uncovers a vast network of deceit and intrigue when he investigates a triple murder that took place in Gorky Park, a Moscow amusement park. As Renko tries to make progress on the case, it becomes dangerously apparent that the KGB doesn't want this homicide to be solved. He eventually meets American Jack Osborne (Lee Marvin), who offers some clues, but Renko soon realizes that Osborne may be just as dangerous as the trailing KGB operatives.

programme.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage (Vin Diesel) must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandora's Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Goldfinger
programme.desc: Special agent 007 (Sean Connery) comes face to face with one of the most notorious villains of all time, and now he must outwit and outgun the powerful tycoon to prevent him from cashing in on a devious scheme to raid Fort Knox -- and obliterate the world's economy.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Billy and the Regulators hear news that John Tunstall's ranch is going to be raided.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Regulators have been on the defensive since the start of war, but Billy draws up a plan which could bring the war to an end. A bold and extraordinary shoot-out marks the beginning of the campaign, and sets the scene for a new spate of killings.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack; all evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody; Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney.. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

programme.title: In the Land of Saints and Sinners
programme.desc: Hoping to leave his dark past behind him, former assassin Finbar Murphy leads a quiet life in a coastal Irish town, far from the political violence that grips the rest of the country. When menacing terrorists show up, Finbar soon discovers that one of them has been abusing a local girl. Drawn into an increasingly vicious game of cat and mouse, he must choose between exposing his secret identity and defending his friends and neighbors.

programme.title: Casualties of War
programme.desc: Pvt. Max Eriksson (Michael J. Fox) is stationed in Vietnam under Sgt. Tony Meserve (Sean Penn). Though Meserve saves Eriksson's life during battle, the two men clash when the callous senior officer orders the abduction of Than Thi Oanh (Thuy Thu Le), a young Vietnamese woman, to be used as a sex slave. When Eriksson refuses to take part in the abuse of Oanh, tensions between him, Meserve and the rest of the unit heat up and finally explode during a firefight with Viet Cong troops.

programme.title: Torn Hearts
programme.desc: A country music duo seek out the private mansion of their idol and end up in a twisted series of horrors that force them to confront the limits they'd go for their dreams.

programme.title: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Vincent Smith (Rory Calhoun) and his sister Ida (Nancy Parsons) run a rural hotel, but they earn most of their cash operating a food stand that specializes in world-famous sausages. After years of success, however, the duo's upstanding brother, Sheriff Bruce (Paul Linke), eventually discovers the grotesque details of his siblings' booming business: Vincent and Ida are actually plumping up their hotel patrons, killing and dismembering them and then grinding them into frankfurters.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: Army Rangers (Michael Dudikoff, Steve James) catch a drug lord sorting genes of Marines to create ninja assassins.

programme.title: The Burning
programme.desc: At summer camp, some teenagers pull a prank on the camp's caretaker, Cropsy (Lou David). But the joke goes terribly wrong, and the teens leave Cropsy for dead after setting him on fire. But no one keeps Cropsy down. A few years later, the burned and disfigured caretaker returns to camp equipped with his trusty shears, ready to unleash his particular brand of vengeance on a whole new group of teens. The murderous Cropsy stalks the campers in the woods, one by one.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza
programme.desc: For sexy Daisy Araujo, her sensible sister Kat and their wisecracking friend Jojo, the summer after high school is a summer they can never forget. Slinging pizza at a local restaurant, the three girls share their hopes, dreams and plans for escaping their small town.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the legendary Mitch Buchannon leads his elite squad of lifeguards on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay. Joined by a trio of hotshot recruits, including former Olympian Matt Brody, they ditch the surf and go deep under cover to take down a ruthless businesswoman whose devious plans threaten the future of the bay.

programme.title: Enchanted April
programme.desc: When married British women Rose Arbuthnot (Miranda Richardson) and Lottie Wilkins (Josie Lawrence) decide to take a break from their respective spouses, they stay at a castle in Italy for a quiet holiday. Joining the ladies is Caroline Dester (Polly Walker), a young socialite, and Mrs. Fisher (Joan Plowright), an older aristocrat. Liberated from their daily routines, the four women ease into life in rural Italy, and each finds herself transformed by the experience.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, Georgia socialite Adele Invergordon announces a publicity-garnering high-stakes match at her struggling family golf course, featuring the greatest golfers of the era. Once-promising local golfer Rannulph Junuh, whose career and life were derailed by World War I, is brought in to play alongside the stars, but his game is weak — until the enigmatic Bagger Vance offers to coach him back into the great golfer he once was.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: In the midst of the Great Depression, a businessman (Jeff Bridges) coping with the tragic death of his son, a jockey with a history of brutal injuries (Tobey Maguire) and a down-and-out horse trainer (Chris Cooper) team up to help Seabiscuit, a temperamental, undersized racehorse. At first the horse struggles to win, but eventually Seabiscuit becomes one of the most successful thoroughbreds of all time, and inspires a nation at a time when it needs it most.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Billionaire and aviation tycoon Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a successful public figure: a director of big-budget Hollywood films such as "Hell's Angels," a passionate lover of Hollywood leading ladies Katharine Hepburn (Cate Blanchett) and Ava Gardner (Kate Beckinsale), and an aviation pioneer who helps build TWA into a major airline. But in private, Hughes remains tormented, suffering from paralyzing phobias and depression. The higher he rises, the farther has to fall.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: A small, turbulent town in Texas obsesses over their high school football team to an unhealthy degree. When the star tailback, Boobie Miles (Derek Luke), is seriously injured during the first game of the season, all hope is lost, and the town's dormant social problems begin to flare up. It is left to the inspiring abilities of new coach Gary Gaines (Billy Bob Thornton) to instill in the other team members -- and, by proxy, the town itself -- a sense of self-respect and honor.

programme.title: Wonder
programme.desc: Born with facial differences that, up until now, have prevented him from going to a mainstream school, Auggie Pullman becomes the most unlikely of heroes when he enters the local fifth grade. As his family, his new classmates, and the larger community all struggle to discover their compassion and acceptance, Auggie's extraordinary journey will unite them and prove you can't blend in when you were born to stand out.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: The Parallax View
programme.desc: After a presidential candidate is assassinated, political reporter Joe Frady begins to suspect that the mysterious Parallax Corporation may be involved. As he investigates, others who share his suspicions start turning up dead, including his editor, Bill Rintels. Eventually, Frady uncovers a conspiracy bigger than anyone expected and must race to prevent the corporation's next big hit as this political thriller plays out in an explosive game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Vince Majestyk (Charles Bronson) is a Vietnam War veteran trying to keep his watermelon farm afloat when he is approached by a crook (Paul Koslo) who tries to force him into employing an inept band of farmhands. This incident lands Vince in jail for assault. There he encounters mobster Frank Renda (Al Lettieri), and instantly makes an enemy when he tries to obstruct the mobster's escape plans. Vince must stand up for his farm and his workers in the face of Frank's efforts to eliminate him.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Following the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, injured veterans turn to adaptive athletics to heal their physical and emotional battle wounds.

programme.title: This is Christmas
programme.desc: Following Adam and Emma on their daily commute from the village of Langton to London, where they meet the same passengers every day.

programme.title: Criminal Law
programme.desc: Up-and-coming Boston attorney Ben Chase successfully defends wealthy Martin Thiel on the charge of a particularly vicious murder. Within 24 hours, another similarly styled murder occurs -- with a new twist that allows Chase to realize he has allowed a guilty man to run free. Chase is startled when Thiel contacts him, requesting he defend him again. Recklessly agreeing in order to gather evidence against Thiel, Chase is soon dragged into the killer's twisted game.

programme.title: My Left Foot
programme.desc: No one expects much from Christy Brown (Daniel Day-Lewis), a boy with cerebral palsy born into a working-class Irish family. Though Christy is a spastic quadriplegic and essentially paralyzed, a miraculous event occurs when, at the age of 5, he demonstrates control of his left foot by using chalk to scrawl a word on the floor. With the help of his steely mother (Brenda Fricker) -- and no shortage of grit and determination -- Christy overcomes his infirmity to become a painter, poet and author.

programme.title: Ordinary People
programme.desc: Tormented by guilt following the death of his older brother, Buck, in a sailing accident, alienated teenager Conrad Jarrett (Timothy Hutton) attempts suicide. Returning home following an extended stay in a psychiatric hospital, Conrad tries to deal with his mental anguish and also reconnect with his mother, Beth (Mary Tyler Moore), who has grown cold and angry, and his emotionally wounded father, Calvin (Donald Sutherland), with the help of his psychiatrist, Dr. Berger (Judd Hirsch).

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: When Johnny (Al Pacino) is released from prison following a forgery charge, he quickly lands a job as a short-order cook at a New York diner. Following a brief fling with waitress Cora (Kate Nelligan), Frankie develops an attraction for Cora's friend and fellow waitress Frankie (Michelle Pfeiffer). While Frankie resists Johnny's charms initially, she eventually relents when her best friend, Tim (Nathan Lane), persuades her to give Johnny a chance.

programme.title: Regretting You
programme.desc: When a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal, Morgan Grant and her daughter, Clara, explore what's left behind as they confront family secrets, redefine love, and rediscover each other.

programme.title: The Departed
programme.desc: South Boston cop Billy Costigan (Leonardo DiCaprio) goes undercover to infiltrate the organization of gangland chief Frank Costello (Jack Nicholson). As Billy gains the mobster's trust, a career criminal named Colin Sullivan (Matt Damon) infiltrates the police department and reports on its activities to his syndicate bosses. When both organizations learn they have a mole in their midst, Billy and Colin must figure out each other's identities to save their own lives.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Vincent Vega (John Travolta) and Jules Winnfield (Samuel L. Jackson) are hitmen with a penchant for philosophical discussions. In this ultra-hip, multi-strand crime movie, their storyline is interwoven with those of their boss, gangster Marsellus Wallace (Ving Rhames) ; his actress wife, Mia (Uma Thurman) ; struggling boxer Butch Coolidge (Bruce Willis) ; master fixer Winston Wolfe (Harvey Keitel) and a nervous pair of armed robbers, "Pumpkin" (Tim Roth) and "Honey Bunny" (Amanda Plummer).

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Boyd's quest to lead the residents home reaches a terrifying crossroads, and nothing will ever be the same again.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Bored billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) decides to entertain himself by stealing a Monet from a reputed museum. When Catherine Banning (Rene Russo), an investigator for the museum's insurance company, takes an interest in Crown, a complicated back-and-forth game with romantic undertones begins between them. In an attempt to find out where Banning's loyalties lie, Crown returns the painting and essentially turns himself in, hoping that Banning's feelings for him will lead to an escape.

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Vince Majestyk (Charles Bronson) is a Vietnam War veteran trying to keep his watermelon farm afloat when he is approached by a crook (Paul Koslo) who tries to force him into employing an inept band of farmhands. This incident lands Vince in jail for assault. There he encounters mobster Frank Renda (Al Lettieri), and instantly makes an enemy when he tries to obstruct the mobster's escape plans. Vince must stand up for his farm and his workers in the face of Frank's efforts to eliminate him.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
programme.desc: Hoping to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate known as the Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Julius Kelp (Jerry Lewis) is a college professor with a problem. Clumsy, awkward, inarticulate and unattractive, Julius is a hopeless case when it comes to women -- but he's desperate to impress beautiful student Stella (Stella Stevens). Fortunately, he does know something about chemistry and decides to concoct a potion that will turn him into a whole new man. In this classic comedy, Julius' suave alter ego, Buddy Love, must win Stella's affections before his short-lived potion runs out.

programme.title: Better Man
programme.desc: The true story of the meteoric rise, dramatic fall, and remarkable resurgence of British pop superstar Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Pocket Listing
programme.desc: When a power player and his sultry wife hire a disgraced property broker to discreetly market and sell their Malibu villa, double crosses, adultery, murder and revenge ensue.

programme.title: The Visitor
programme.desc: When Robert and his wife move to her childhood home, he discovers an old portrait in the attic of a man who looks just like him. He soon travels down a frightening rabbit hole as he tries to discover the true identity of his mysterious doppelgänger, only to realize that every family has its own terrifying secrets.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: Straight-arrow policewoman Cooper (Reese Witherspoon) is excited and thrilled about her next assignment. Her task is to escort Daniella Riva (Sofía Vergara), a wisecracking Colombian beauty, from San Antonio to Dallas so both she and her husband can testify against a drug lord. Plans go awry when Mr. Riva gets ambushed, leaving Daniella a widow. Cooper and her witness must now use their wits to escape from crooked cops and murderous gunmen, while not killing each other in the process.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Widow Aurora Greenway (Shirley MacLaine) and her daughter, Emma (Debra Winger), have a strong bond, but Emma marries teacher Flap Horton (Jeff Daniels) against her mother's wishes. When the marriage grows sour due to Flap's cheating, Emma eventually splits from him, returning to her mother, who is involved with a former astronaut (Jack Nicholson). Soon, Emma learns that she has terminal cancer. In the hospital, supported by Aurora, she tries to make peace with Flap and her children.

programme.title: She's All That
programme.desc: High school hotshot Zach Siler (Freddie Prinze Jr.) is the envy of his peers. But his popularity declines sharply when his cheerleader girlfriend, Taylor (Jodi Lyn O'Keefe), leaves him for sleazy reality-television star Brock Hudson (Matthew Lillard). Desperate to revive his fading reputation, Siler agrees to a seemingly impossible challenge. He has six weeks to gain the trust of nerdy outcast Laney Boggs (Rachael Leigh Cook) -- and help her to become the school's next prom queen.

programme.title: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: All Ben Holmes (Ben Affleck) wants to do is make it from New York to Savannah, Ga., in time for his wedding. When a seagull and a hurricane ruin any chance he has of flying there, Holmes reluctantly joins the quirky Sarah Lewis (Sandra Bullock) in a rental car for a road trip back to his waiting bride-to-be, Bridget Cahill (Maura Tierney). But nature seems to conspire against his every attempt at a timely return -- and in the meantime, he finds himself growing closer to Sarah.

programme.title: Mermaids
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Charlotte Flax (Winona Ryder) is tired of her wacky mom (Cher) moving their family to a different town any time she feels it is necessary. When they move to a small Massachusetts town and Mrs. Flax begins dating a shopkeeper (Bob Hoskins), Charlotte and her 9-year-old sister, Kate (Christina Ricci), hope that they can finally settle down. But when Charlotte's attraction to an older man gets in the way, the family must learn to accept each other for who they truly are.

programme.title: Chocolat
programme.desc: When mysterious Vianne and her child arrive in a tranquil French town in the winter of 1959, no one could have imagined the impact that she and her spirited daughter would have on the community stubbornly rooted in tradition. Within days, she opens an unusual chocolate shop, across the square from the church. Her ability to perceive her customers' desires and satisfy them with just the right confection, coaxes the villagers to abandon themselves to temptation -- just as Lent begins.

programme.title: El Dorado
programme.desc: Heartless tycoon Bart Jason (Edward Asner) hires a group of thugs to force the MacDonald family out of El Dorado so he can claim their land. J.P. Harrah, the town's sheriff, is too deep in the throes of alcoholism to help the family. When Harrah's friend, noble elder gunfighter Cole Thorton (John Wayne), learns of the predicament, he travels to El Dorado with his upstart friend, Mississippi (James Caan), to help Harrah clean up in time for a shootout against Jason's men.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: Naval Reservist pilot Lt. Harry Brubaker (William Holden) is stationed on an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan during the Korean War. Although suffering from battle fatigue and longing to return to civilian life with his wife, Nancy (Grace Kelly), he agrees to fly a dangerous bombing mission over North Korea, with the support of his faithful rescue crew, Forney (Mickey Rooney) and Gamidge (Earl Holliman), and his sympathetic commanding officer, Commander Lee (Charles McGraw).

programme.title: In Old California
programme.desc: Tom Craig (John Wayne) is just a modest pharmacist in gold-rush-era California until he discovers saloon owner Britt Dawson (Albert Dekker) is getting rich by forcing the local ranchers to pay protection money. Not one to stand for injustice, Craig rallies the ranchers and attempts to overthrow Dawson's rule. To turn the mob against Craig, Dawson poisons one of Craig's patients and frames the pharmacist, but when illness breaks out, Craig is the only one who can help.

programme.title: The French Lieutenant's Woman
programme.desc: In this story-within-a-story, Anna (Meryl Streep) is an actress starring opposite Mike (Jeremy Irons) in a period piece about the forbidden love between their respective characters, Sarah and Charles. Both actors are involved in serious relationships, but the passionate nature of the script leads to an off-camera love affair as well. While attempting to maintain their composure and professionalism, Anna and Mike struggle to come to terms with their infidelity.

programme.title: Run the Tide
programme.desc: When his drug-addicted mother leaves prison, a man (Taylor Lautner) kidnaps his younger brother (Nico Christou) and flees to the California coast for a better life.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is perfectly content to fade into the background, but when one of his co-workers goes on a sudden and violent rampage, he must face his fears and confront his troubled past to survive.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: A stranger (Philip Baker Hall) mentors a young Reno gambler (John C. Reilly) who weds a hooker (Gwyneth Paltrow) and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

programme.title: Weekend in Taipei
programme.desc: A former DEA agent and an ex-undercover operative rekindle their romance during a weekend in Taipei. As they reconnect, they're oblivious to the looming dangers stemming from their past operations.

programme.title: Thelma & Louise
programme.desc: Meek housewife Thelma (Geena Davis) joins her friend Louise (Susan Sarandon), an independent waitress, on a short fishing trip. However, their trip becomes a flight from the law when Louise shoots and kills a man who tries to rape Thelma at a bar. Louise decides to flee to Mexico, and Thelma joins her. On the way, Thelma falls for sexy young thief J.D. (Brad Pitt) and the sympathetic Detective Slocumb (Harvey Keitel) tries to convince the two women to surrender before their fates are sealed.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto enjoys the adrenaline of street car racing and his fans treat him like a rock star. After a blazing encounter with the ruthless Johnny Tran, Dom decides to take Brian, a newcomer to street racing, under his wing. Dom's sister Mia sees something she likes in Brian, too. Trouble is, neither of them realize he's an undercover cop, and Dominic and his rival Johnny Tran are both the prime suspects in a case involving dirty money and big-rig hijacking.

programme.title: Protector
programme.desc: Nikki is a former war hero whose life gets shattered when her daughter is kidnapped by sex traffickers. Thrust into a criminal underworld while also being hunted by police and the military, she fights by any means possible to rescue her child.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Years after witnessing the death of Maximus at the hands of his uncle, Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honor needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: While taping a football game, cameraman Harry Hinkle (Jack Lemmon) ends up slightly injured after a collision with star player "Boom Boom" Jackson (Ron Rich). When Hinkle's scheming brother-in-law, lawyer Willie Gingrich (Walter Matthau), catches wind of the incident, he wants Hinkle to feign paralysis to scam the insurance company. Hinkle agrees to the plan, if only to win back his ex (Judi West). But Hinkle's growing friendship with a guilt-ridden Jackson has him questioning the ploy.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After hired hand Tom Chaney (Jeff Corey) murders the father of 14-year-old Mattie Ross (Kim Darby), she seeks vengeance and hires U.S. Marshal Rooster Cogburn (John Wayne), a man of true grit, to track Chaney into Indian territory. As the two begin their pursuit, a Texas Ranger, La Boeuf (Glen Campbell), joins the manhunt in hopes of capturing Chaney for the murder of a Texas senator and collecting a substantial reward. The three clash on their quest of bringing to justice the same man.

programme.title: Audrey Rose
programme.desc: Husband and wife Janice (Marsha Mason) and Bill Templeton (John Beck) lead a pleasant life, residing in New York and sending their daughter, Ivy (Susan Swift), to a good school. Things change, though, when the odd Elliot Hoover (Anthony Hopkins) arrives and tells the couple that, after having spent time in India, he believes Ivy is the reincarnated spirit of his daughter, who died years earlier. The Templetons scoff, but ensuing supernatural events soon turn their lives upside down.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Imprisoned during World War II in a German POW camp, a group of Allied soldiers are intent on breaking out, not only to escape, but also to draw Nazi forces away from battle to search for fugitives. Among the prisoners determined to escape are American Captain Virgil Hilts (Steve McQueen) and British Squadron Leader Roger Bartlett (Richard Attenborough). Outwitting their captors by digging a tunnel out of the prison grounds, the soldiers find the stakes much higher when escape becomes a reality.

programme.title: Yours, Mine & Ours
programme.desc: When Coast Guard Adm. Frank Beardsley (Dennis Quaid) decides to move his family of eight children back to his old hometown, he encounters handbag designer Helen North (Rene Russo), an old flame from high school. Immediately, sparks fly between the two, and marriage is proposed. But Frank isn't the only one with kids to worry about -- Helen has a total of 10. Right away, the children have no intention of playing nicely, and together they decide to sabotage their parents' relationship.

programme.title: He Said, She Said
programme.desc: The battle of the sexes is displayed from dueling perspectives when two journalists at the same newspaper with little in common are offered their own point-counterpoint talk show. Dan Hanson (Kevin Bacon) is a conceited conservative with sex on the brain, and Lorie Bryer (Elizabeth Perkins) is an erudite liberal looking for long-term love. Their deep-set differences cause sparks to fly and ratings to soar. But things get complicated when opposites attract and romance blossoms.

programme.title: Chasing Amy
programme.desc: Holden and Banky are best friends and authors of a popular comic book. Holden falls in love with Alyssa, who happens to be a lesbian. Holden's relationship with Alyssa strains his life-long friendship with Banky, and soon the relationship between Holden and Alyssa has problems when he cannot deal with her past.

programme.title: Beautiful Girls
programme.desc: An all-star cast sparks this captivating comedy about a group of old friends whose 10-year high school reunion creates some hilariously unexpected surprises. Willie (Timothy Hutton), Tommy (Matt Dillon), and Paul may have lost a bit of their youth, but they're still ready to party with Uma Thurman, Rosie O'Donnell, Lauren Holly, and Mira Sorvino -- the beautiful girls who've turned their lives upside down!

programme.title: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Following a ridiculously awful flight that leads to his pet's death, Nashawn Wade files a lawsuit against the airline, and wins a multimillion-dollar settlement. Determined to create a better flying experience, Nashawn starts his own airline, one that caters to an African-American clientele. Going into business with a tricked-out plane piloted by the smooth Capt. Mack, the airline hits a snag when it has to deal with the family of Elvis Hunkee.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: Con artist Lawrence Jamieson (Michael Caine) is a longtime resident of a luxurious coastal resort, where he enjoys the fruits of his deceptions -- that is, until a competitor, Freddy Benson (Steve Martin), shows up. When the new guy's lowbrow tactics impinge on his own work, Jamieson resolves to get rid of him. Confident of his own duplicitous talents, Jamieson challenges Benson to a winner-takes-all competition: whoever swindles their latest mark first can stay, while the other must leave town.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are high school buddies starting a band. However, they are about to fail their history class, which means Ted would be sent to military school. They receive help from Rufus (George Carlin), a traveler from a future where their band is the foundation for a perfect society. With the use of Rufus' time machine, Bill and Ted travel to various points in history, returning with important figures to help them complete their final history presentation.
