programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: A beautiful fugitive (Kathryn Leigh Scott) interrupts Banner's wilderness retreat.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner finds love with a psychiatrist (Mariette Hartley) with a problem of her own.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Banner helps a woman (Carol Baxter) deal with a tragedy from her childhood.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: After the Hulk innocently helps a dangerous man escape from the police, David has to correct his mistake.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Vet claims horse was destroyed.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael's investigation of a toxic-waste dump nearly leads to KITT's destruction; guest Heather McNair.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics try to boost the confidence of a trainee who has doubts about his readiness to take on emergency duties in the field.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Brackett cares for an ailing foreign dignitary; the paramedics rescue a helicopter pilot, deliver a baby and prevent a suicide jump.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage diagnoses tonsillitis for DeSoto, who claims to have had his tonsils removed; McCall is reunited with an old love (Robert Alda).

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage's and DeSoto's stands on honesty are put to the test when people who withhold vital information experience different consequences.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A woman believes her dead sister is the cause of accidents in her home; a man is trapped underwater in his car with the doors jammed.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Station 51's mascot, Boot, won't eat; accidents befall a woman attempting to cook a meal; a man nearly dies from an aspirin overdose.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics conduct several rescues under a shadow of guilt after being accused of stealing from a patient; guest Jo Anne Worley.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto must decide whether to amputate the leg of a trapped construction worker (James McEachin); nervous Gage faces an IRS tax audit.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An assembly bill to create a paramedic program meets opposition from doctors and firefighters; pilot for the series.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An assembly bill to create a paramedic program meets opposition from doctors and firefighters; pilot for the series.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Murdock takes up painting and Face becomes a critic to bust a ring of Beverly Hills art thieves; guests Lloyd Bochner, Dennis Franz.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A saboteur attempts to put two sisters (Suzanne Barnes, Claudia Christian) out of the soda business.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: During a mountain holiday, the team is caught between robbers and the pursuing Army; guests Ken Swofford, Kristen Meadows.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A judge hires the team to free his daughter, held prisoner in Italy by mobsters seeking to ensure the outcome of a trial.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A judge hires the team to free his daughter, held prisoner in Italy by mobsters seeking to ensure the outcome of a trial.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer, a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew, whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Island of Lost Souls
programme.desc: White-suited Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton) herds his bestial mutants and plots to mate his panther-woman with a visitor (Richard Arlen).","large":"In this adaptation of H.G. Wells' novel "The Island of Doctor Moreau," Edward Parker (Richard Arlen) is shipwrecked on a remote island presided over by the mysterious Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton). Edward discovers his host is conducting genetic experiments, and presiding over a race of half-human, half-animal hybrids, including the alluring Panther Woman and the sage Sayer of the Law (Bela Lugosi). The island has become its own society, with Moreau as its god.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Based on a Ray Bradbury short story about an astronomer's encounter with extraterrestrials in the Arizona desert.","large":"While looking through his telescope one night, John Putnam (Richard Carlson) sees what at first appears to be a meteor shower -- but it is actually a crash-landing alien spaceship! After investigating the crater from the impact, John informs the town sheriff (Charles Drake), and receives nothing but ridicule. Even his fiancée, Ellen (Barbara Rush), is skeptical. All that changes when the townsfolk start disappearing, and are replaced by eerie alien duplicates.

programme.title: Kiss of the Vampire
programme.desc: A professor (Clifford Evans) in black rescues stranded 1910 newlyweds from a Bavarian doctor's (Noel Willman) vampire villa.

programme.title: The Mad Doctor of Market Street
programme.desc: A fugitive doctor (Lionel Atwill) tries to raise the dead for South Sea Islanders.

programme.title: The Mad Ghoul
programme.desc: A mad scientist (George Zucco) turns his assistant (David Bruce) into a zombie as part of a plan to steal his assistant's lover (Evelyn Ankers).

programme.title: Man-Made Monster
programme.desc: A mad scientist (Lionel Atwill) makes an electric man (Lon Chaney Jr.) who glows and must wear a rubber suit.

programme.title: The Monster and the Girl
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.","large":"A team of British archaeologists led by Sir Joseph Whemple discover the mummified remains of the ancient Egyptian prince Imhotep, along with the legendary scroll of Thoth. When one of the archaeologists recites the scroll aloud, Imhotep returns to life, but escapes. Several years later, Imhotep has taken on the guise of a wealthy man, as he searches Egypt for his lost love, who he believes has been reincarnated as the lovely Helen Grosvenor.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: A mummy (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the Louisiana bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.","large":"In Cairo, archaeologist Steve Banning (Dick Foran) unearths a vase that he believes could lead him to the ancient tomb of Princess Ananka. Unknown to Steve, his colleague, Professor Andoheb (George Zucco), is also the High Priest of Karnak who holds the secrets of Karas, a mummy who guards Ananka's tomb. Upon receiving funds from magician Solvani (Cecil Kellaway) and his daughter, Marta (Peggy Moran), Steve and the Solvanis embark on an expedition to the grave site, where Karas awaits.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: The Car
programme.desc: A Western deputy sheriff (James Brolin) chases a driverless black car that keeps running people down.","large":"Two bicyclists are run down by a strange black car in the desert near a small town in Utah. But this is just the first in a series of hit-and-run murders. Sheriff Wade Parents (James Brolin) is called in to investigate, and his deputy, Everett (John Marley), is killed by the black sedan, which, some witnesses say, has no one behind its wheel. When the car threatens a local school parade, the lives of the town's children and Wade's teacher girlfriend, Lauren (Kathleen Lloyd), are endangered.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Fossil hunters (Richard Carlson, Julia Adams, Richard Denning) encounter a dangerous, humanlike amphibian in the Amazon.","large":"Remnants of a mysterious animal have come to light in a remote jungle, and a group of scientists intends to determine if the find is an anomaly or evidence of an undiscovered beast. To accomplish their goal, the scientists (Antonio Moreno, Richard Carlson, Richard Denning, Whit Bissell) must brave the most perilous pieces of land South America has to offer. But the terrain is nothing compared to the danger posed by an otherworldly being that endangers their work and their lives.

programme.title: The Creature Walks Among Us
programme.desc: Scientists (Jeff Morrow, Rex Reason) capture the creature from the black lagoon and turn him into an air breather.

programme.title: Curse of the Undead
programme.desc: A cow-town preacher (Eric Fleming) shoots a custom bullet at a vampire gunfighter (Michael Pate) in the Old West.

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf
programme.desc: The son of a servant assaulted by a beggar becomes a wolfman in 18th-century Spain.

programme.title: Curucu, Beast of the Amazon
programme.desc: A doctor (Beverly Garland) and an adventurer (John Bromfield) head for the Amazon, where a guy (Tom Payne) in a bird suit is scaring natives.

programme.title: The Deadly Mantis
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Craig Stevens) and a paleontologist (William Hopper) track a huge praying mantis from the North Pole to Manhattan.

programme.title: Dr. Cyclops
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Albert Dekker) in Peru reduces a woman (Janice Logan) and three men to one-fifth their normal size.","large":"To assist with his work due to his failing eyesight, renowned biologist Dr. Alexander Thorkel invites two prominent scientists and a mineralogist to his hidden Amazon jungle laboratory. Thorkel remains evasive about the nature of his experiments, and after the team evaluates his bacteria slides, he orders them away. When they refuse, Thorkel and his servant trick them into a chamber where Thorkel shrinks them down to microscopic size, and they escape to the terrifying jungle.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: A real-estate man (Dwight Frye) visits the Transylvania castle of a 500-year-old vampire (Bela Lugosi).","large":"The dashing, mysterious Count Dracula (Bela Lugosi), after hypnotizing a British soldier, Renfield (Dwight Frye), into his mindless slave, travels to London and takes up residence in an old castle. Soon Dracula begins to wreak havoc, sucking the blood of young women and turning them into vampires. When he sets his sights on Mina (Helen Chandler), the daughter of a prominent doctor, vampire-hunter Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan) is enlisted to put a stop to the count's never-ending bloodlust.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier) investigates as the vampire count (Frank Langella) scales walls and visits bedrooms at an English manor.","large":"A man washes ashore in England after a shipwreck and is found by Mina Van Helsing (Jan Francis). The man introduces himself as Count Dracula (Frank Langella) of Transylvania, and proceeds to integrate himself into the lives of Mina and her friend Lucy Seward (Kate Nelligan). However, when Mina dies and her father, Prof. Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier), attributes her death to a vampire, evidence indicates that Count Dracula is the monster, and Lucy is his next target.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: This was made at night using the same sets and script as the Bela Lugosi classic but with a Spanish cast.","large":"Soon after beginning work for Conde Dracula (Carlos Villarias), the clerk Renfield (Pablo Alvarez Rubio) learns that his employer is, in fact, a vampire who lives on human blood. Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter
programme.desc: A vampire countess (Gloria Holden) in black falls in love with a psychologist (Otto Kruger) and kidnaps his fiancée (Marguerite Churchill).","large":"Although Count Dracula was destroyed by Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan), who is now being tried for his murder, Dracula's daughter, the Countess Marya Zaleska (Gloria Holden), is still alive -- and her father's death has brought her no closer to eradicating her vampiric thirst for blood. When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.title: The Evil of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron (Peter Cushing) and a hypnotist (Peter Woodthorpe) bring the creature out of ice, horrifying villagers of Karlsbad.","large":"Dr. Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) returns destitute to his home village to recommence his experimental research into the reanimation of dead tissue, and stumbles upon his old monster suspended in ice. Though he revives the creature, Frankenstein must seek the help of hypnotist Zoltan (Peter Woodthorpe) to repair its mind. Zoltan then assumes control of the monster, using him to wreak havoc. But when Frankenstein tries to regain power over his creation, he becomes Zoltan's next target.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein creates a monster from cadavers and a killer's brain.

programme.title: Tremors: A Cold Day in Hell
programme.desc: Burt Gummer suspects that giant worms are being utilized as weapons at a research facility in Canada. He soon finds himself in a race against time to create an antidote from one of the creature's venom to save his own life.

programme.title: Tremors: Shrieker Island
programme.desc: Burt Gummer must save the day when a wealthy playboy unleashes a gigantic, carnivorous worm and other monsters on a tropical island.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: A police detective (James Belushi) with a girlfriend (Mel Harris) gets stuck with a new partner, a German shepherd dog.","large":"Michael Dooley is a cop who likes to work alone. But while working a case to bust Lyman, a notorious international drug lord, his boss assigns him a partner to assist. That partner is Jerry Lee, a drug-sniffing dog. At first Dooley can't stand his furry sidekick, especially since the dog seems to take pleasure in destroying Dooley's possessions. But when Dooley discovers that Jerry Lee's drug-sniffing skills are no joke, he warms up to the pooch.

programme.title: Problem Child
programme.desc: An eager yuppie (John Ritter) and his wife adopt a little boy, Junior (Michael Oliver), who's totally out of control.","large":"Ben is a good-hearted guy who's always wanted a son of his own, but so far he and his wife have had no success. The couple adopt Junior, a redheaded hellion who quickly makes their lives miserable. Disaster follows Junior wherever he goes, from camping trips that require emergency-room visits to birthday parties that turn into Grand Guignol affairs. When Ben's incensed family tells him to get rid of the boy, he starts to wonder if they might be right.

programme.title: Problem Child 2
programme.desc: Unruly Junior (Michael Oliver) meets wild Trixie, and together they try to match his father (John Ritter) with her mother.","large":"Ben Healy (John Ritter) and his adopted son, the mischievous and destructive Junior (Michael Oliver), move to a new town for a fresh start in what happens to be "the divorcée capital of the world." Now the two face a multitude of women throwing themselves at Ben, though a new mom isn't what Junior wants. But Junior has more to worry about than his father's dates -- the little troublemaker might have met his match in Trixie Young (Ivyann Schwan), a small girl with a big chip on her shoulder.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover officer (Arnold Schwarzenegger) teaches a rowdy class of peewees, to identify one whose mother must be found.","large":"In this action-comedy, unusual circumstances find big, brawny cop John Kimble (Arnold Schwarzenegger) posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to apprehend major drug lord Cullen Crisp (Richard Tyson), as well as his ruthless accomplice and mother, Eleanor (Carroll Baker). While pretending to be a kid-friendly instructor, Kimble falls for pretty fellow teacher Joyce Palmieri (Penelope Ann Miller) as he battles both unruly children and dangerous bad guys.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop 2
programme.desc: A gruff FBI agent goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. He's there to recover stolen data, but first he'll have to learn to survive in the politically correct world of elementary education.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An obese scientist drops the pounds and his poor self-image when a secret formula turns him into a slender ladies man.","large":"Brilliant and obese scientist Sherman Klump (Eddie Murphy) invents a miraculous weight-loss solution. After a date with chemistry student Carla Purty (Jada Pinkett) goes badly, a depressed Klump tries the solution on himself. Though he instantly loses 250 pounds, the side effects include a second personality: an obnoxiously self-assertive braggart who calls himself Buddy Love. Buddy proves to be more popular than Sherman, but his arrogance and bad behavior quickly spiral out of control.

programme.title: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: In an attempt to remove Buddy Love from his subconscious, professor Klump accidentally creates him as a separate person.","large":"Professor Sherman Klump (Eddie Murphy) is getting married. And the Klump family could not be more delighted. His fiancée Denise (Janet Jackson) is thrilled to become a Klump, and with her appetite she'll fit right in. But Buddy Love ... well, Buddy is another matter.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An obese scientist drops the pounds and his poor self-image when a secret formula turns him into a slender ladies man.","large":"Brilliant and obese scientist Sherman Klump (Eddie Murphy) invents a miraculous weight-loss solution. After a date with chemistry student Carla Purty (Jada Pinkett) goes badly, a depressed Klump tries the solution on himself. Though he instantly loses 250 pounds, the side effects include a second personality: an obnoxiously self-assertive braggart who calls himself Buddy Love. Buddy proves to be more popular than Sherman, but his arrogance and bad behavior quickly spiral out of control.

But Buddy Love ... well, Buddy is another matter.

programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: A man has to figure out a way to make extra money when his father-in-law moves in.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: A police detective (James Belushi) with a girlfriend (Mel Harris) gets stuck with a new partner, a German shepherd dog.","large":"Michael Dooley is a cop who likes to work alone. But while working a case to bust Lyman, a notorious international drug lord, his boss assigns him a partner to assist. That partner is Jerry Lee, a drug-sniffing dog. At first Dooley can't stand his furry sidekick, especially since the dog seems to take pleasure in destroying Dooley's possessions. But when Dooley discovers that Jerry Lee's drug-sniffing skills are no joke, he warms up to the pooch.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Unborn
programme.desc: With the help of a spiritualist (Gary Oldman), a woman (Odette Yustman) uncovers a family curse dating back to Nazi Germany and involving a demonic spirit with the power to inhabit anything or anyone.","large":"Plagued by nightmares and visitations from tortured ghosts, Casey Beldon turns to a spiritual adviser named Sendak for help. They discover a family curse that dates back to Nazi Germany: an evil spirit that can take over the body of anyone and is getting stronger with each possession, as it tries to gain full entrance to this world.

programme.title: Stephanie
programme.desc: After a mysterious global catastrophe, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home.","large":"A young girl is left alone in her house during a worldwide catastrophe and fearfully hides from a malevolent force that is stalking her. When her parents miraculously return, they try to settle back into normal life, but become increasingly concerned about something that has affected their daughter Stephanie.

programme.title: Land of the Dead
programme.desc: A mercenary leader (Simon Baker) squares off with a rebellious comrade (John Leguizamo), while flesh-eating zombies threaten their fortified city.","large":"In a world where zombies form the majority of the population, the remaining humans build a feudal society away from the undead. Ruthless Paul Kaufman (Dennis Hopper) rules and protects this microcosm but enforces painful class distinctions. Second-in-command Cholo DeMora (John Leguizamo) attempts to lead a secret rebellion against Kaufman's tyranny, but when the zombies begin to evolve, the survivors must discover a way to protect themselves from a zombie horde that can learn and adapt.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Firestarter
programme.desc: Quasifederal agents hunt a man (David Keith), who can bend minds, and his daughter (Drew Barrymore), who can start fires by staring.","large":"As youths, Andy McGee and his future wife, Vicky, participated in secret experiments, allowing themselves to be subjected to mysterious medical tests. Years later, the couple's daughter, Charlie, begins to exhibit the ability of setting fires solely with her mind. This volatile talent makes the youngster extremely dangerous, and soon she becomes a target for the enigmatic agency known as "The Shop.".

programme.title: Seed of Chucky
programme.desc: Resurrected by their offspring (Billy Boyd), the murderous doll (Brad Dourif) and his twisted bride (Jennifer Tilly) learn about a new movie featuring their killer exploits.","large":"Gentle Glen (Billy Boyd) is a ventriloquist's dummy, the offspring of evil doll Chucky (Brad Dourif) and his doll bride (Jennifer Tilly), both of whom are now deceased. When the orphaned Glen hears that a film is being made about his parents, he goes to Hollywood and resurrects them in an attempt to get to know them better. He is horrified when Chucky and his lover embark on a new killing spree, and Chucky is equally horrified that his son has no taste for evil.

programme.title: Bride of Chucky
programme.desc: Animated by a vicious killer's spirit, a battered doll and its mate seek help from neighbors (Katherine Heigl, Nick Stabile) to regain human form.","large":"After being cut apart by the police, killer doll Chucky (Brad Dourif) is resurrected by Tiffany (Jennifer Tilly), an ex-girlfriend of the serial murderer whose soul is inside the toy. Following an argument, Chucky kills Tiffany and transfers her soul into a bride doll. To find the magical amulet that can restore them both to human form, Chucky and Tiffany arrange to be driven to New Jersey by Jesse (Nick Stabile) and Jade (Katherine Heigl), who are unaware that their cargo is alive.

programme.title: Firestarter
programme.desc: Quasifederal agents hunt a man (David Keith), who can bend minds, and his daughter (Drew Barrymore), who can start fires by staring.","large":"As youths, Andy McGee and his future wife, Vicky, participated in secret experiments, allowing themselves to be subjected to mysterious medical tests. Years later, the couple's daughter, Charlie, begins to exhibit the ability of setting fires solely with her mind. This volatile talent makes the youngster extremely dangerous, and soon she becomes a target for the enigmatic agency known as "The Shop.".

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: The Unborn
programme.desc: With the help of a spiritualist (Gary Oldman), a woman (Odette Yustman) uncovers a family curse dating back to Nazi Germany and involving a demonic spirit with the power to inhabit anything or anyone.","large":"Plagued by nightmares and visitations from tortured ghosts, Casey Beldon turns to a spiritual adviser named Sendak for help. They discover a family curse that dates back to Nazi Germany: an evil spirit that can take over the body of anyone and is getting stronger with each possession, as it tries to gain full entrance to this world.

programme.title: Your Highness
programme.desc: A slacker prince must join his braver brother on a quest to save the brother's fiancée from an evil wizard.","large":"Prince Thadeous has always lived his life in the shadow of his brother, the heir apparent, Prince Fabious. Tired of always being passed over, Thadeous is now content to slack off, drink mead and enjoy the company of a maiden or two, while Fabious has fabulous adventures. But when an evil wizard kidnaps Fabious' fiancée, Thadeous has no choice but to find his inner hero and join his brother's quest to save her.

programme.title: Paul
programme.desc: On a pilgrimage to America's UFO heartland, two British sci-fi geeks (Simon Pegg, Nick Frost) meet an extraterrestrial and hatch a plan to help him return to his spaceship.","large":"For the past 60 years, a wisecracking alien named Paul (Seth Rogen) has resided at a top-secret military base in America's UFO heartland. When Paul decides he has had enough of Earth, he escapes from the compound and hops on the first handy vehicle -- a rented RV manned by two British sci-fi nerds named Graeme (Simon Pegg) and Clive (Nick Frost). With federal agents and the father of an accidental kidnap victim on their tail, the two hatch a crazy plan to help Paul return to his spaceship.

programme.title: The World's End
programme.desc: An immature 40-year-old convinces his childhood pals to join him in an epic pub-crawl, but as they make their way toward their final destination, a battle for mankind emerges.","large":"Gary King (Simon Pegg) is an immature 40-year-old who's dying to take another stab at an epic pub-crawl that he last attempted 20 years earlier. He drags his reluctant buddies back to their hometown and sets out for a night of heavy drinking. As they make their way toward their ultimate destination -- the fabled World's End pub -- Gary and his friends attempt to reconcile the past and present. However, the real struggle is for the future when their journey turns into a battle for mankind.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: An aimless TV salesman (Simon Pegg) and his best pal must save their friends and family from the zombies that have overrun London.","large":"Shaun is a 30-something loser with a dull, easy existence. When he's not working at the electronics store, he lives with his slovenly best friend, Ed, in a small flat on the outskirts of London. The only unpredictable element in his life is his girlfriend, Liz, who wishes desperately for Shaun to grow up and be a man. When the town is inexplicably overrun with zombies, Shaun must rise to the occasion and protect both Liz and his mother.

programme.title: Dave Chappelle's Block Party
programme.desc: Actor, writer and comic Dave Chappelle loads up a bus with residents of his Ohio hometown and takes them to Brooklyn, N.Y., for a concert featuring Kanye West, the Fugees and others.","large":"Actor, writer and comic Dave Chappelle loads up a bus with residents of his Ohio hometown and takes them to Brooklyn, N.Y. Once there, the travelers enjoy a concert featuring Kanye West, the Fugees, Big Daddy Kane and others. Rehearsal footage and Chappelle's brand of comedy enliven the proceedings.

programme.title: Half Baked
programme.desc: Potheads (Dave Chappelle, Guillermo Diaz, Jim Breuer) sell marijuana to raise bail for a fellow stoner who accidentally killed a horse.","large":"When a member of their crew gets arrested for killing a New York City police horse by feeding it junk food, three slackin' stoners are forced to get off their butts and raise bail by selling pot stolen from a pharmaceutical lab. It's a risky plan but, hey, these are stand-up guys who would do anything to help out a friend in need.

programme.title: How High
programme.desc: Two stoners (Method Man, Redman) get into Harvard University after magic marijuana enables them to ace their tests.","large":"Multi-platinum rap superstars Redman and Method Man star as Jamal and Silas, two regular guys who smoke something magical, ace their college entrance exams and wind up at Harvard. Ivy League ways are strange but Silas and Jamal take it in a stride -- until their supply of supernatural smoke runs dry. That's when they have to start living by their wits and rely on their natural resources to make the grade.

programme.title: Your Highness
programme.desc: A slacker prince must join his braver brother on a quest to save the brother's fiancée from an evil wizard.","large":"Prince Thadeous has always lived his life in the shadow of his brother, the heir apparent, Prince Fabious. Tired of always being passed over, Thadeous is now content to slack off, drink mead and enjoy the company of a maiden or two, while Fabious has fabulous adventures. But when an evil wizard kidnaps Fabious' fiancée, Thadeous has no choice but to find his inner hero and join his brother's quest to save her.

programme.title: Balls of Fury
programme.desc: A disgraced ping pong player bounces back to go undercover for the government and bring a notorious crime lord to justice.","large":"A hard fall from grace strips Randy Daytona of being considered a ping pong phenomenon. Now he must bounce back to take on an undercover assignment for the government. The FBI wants him to enter a tournament sponsored by Feng, a ping-pong enthusiast and notorious criminal. Randy must get the goods on Feng and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a young Basque is murdered, his father (Ernest Borgnine) searches for the killer to avenge his death.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Elizabeth McQueeny joins the wagon train under the pretense of opening a finishing school out West, but Major Adams discovers her true intentions.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A major's daughter once involved with McCullough now detests him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A determined ex-riverboat captain tries to keep his grandson with him.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess goes to help an old prospector friend, he crosses Matt Jessup and his gang, who have the townsfolk too scared to talk.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A professor from the East asks Slim to guide him to his friend's gold strike from a decade earlier, but there is more to the professor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A woman looks to Slim for help when a gang of outlaws plans to kill her marshal husband as revenge for a robbery he averted.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While Jess is acting sheriff of Laramie, a notorious yet cowardly bounty hunter targets one of Jess' friends.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While delivering $10,000 to the stage office, Slim manages to stop one holdup attempt, but a second attempt is successful, leaving Slim to chase down the missing money and the robber.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie plots to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie has trouble delivering a diamond.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie searches for Eli Fisher, but first must deal with the man who's been trailing him -- and who's also searching for Fisher.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: While in search of a thief called The Utah Kid, Jim learns that his quarry has been hanged in a small town -- but the crook's stolen cash remains missing.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie suspects that a paroled man -- who is working as an eccentric frontier dentist -- may have something to do with a murdered stage driver.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie is chasing down a suspect wanted for robbery and murder, but a town sheriff's ties to the suspect's family might make matters difficult.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A jewel shipment must be delivered, and the owner's daughter wants to do it personally.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When $50,000 goes missing from a stagecoach, and with few leads to go on, Jim suspects a safe-cracking marshal of the theft.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie is transporting a prisoner to stand trial in Santa Fe, but when they stop in a small town along the way, he discovers that there's a price on the man's head -- and the mayor and sheriff may not let him leave alive.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A stolen stagecoach is found by Hardie in a town near the Mexico border, miles from any Wells Fargo station.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: The murder of a casino manager.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A vengeful woman informs Hardie of a plot to rob a Wells Fargo station.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie and an old friend track down a suspect who might know the location of Jefferson Davis' buried treasure.

programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a young boy wanders off to find Santa Claus.

programme.desc: Friends locked in a senseless feud.

programme.desc: Flint brings a young boy to San Francisco to live with his uncle.

programme.desc: A small band of travelers makes its way through the desert for a rendezvous with the wagon train.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The wagon train runs low on water and the passengers look for a new watering place.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bank robbery leads to the recovery of a high-strung horse from Slim's ranch, and prompts a disagreement between Slim and Andy.

programme.title: Laramie

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hope to sell horses to the stage line and collect the extra money offered, so Jess goes in search of horses to sell.

programme.title: Laramie

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bounty hunter turned sheriff comes looking for Jess, who has a price on his head for the killing of Blake Wilkie.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: An Army captain wanted for desertion.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: An actor visits a ghost town where he last appeared with his late wife.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A Wells Fargo employee has been killed and Hardie suspects a boxer.

programme.desc: An incoming stage has problems with a drunken, violent passenger who turns out to be the boxer John L. Sullivan.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.desc: Hardie suspects murder when a Fargo agent allegedly commits suicide.

programme.desc: A woman mine owner won't give Wells Fargo a contract until they are investigated.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: A story of a con artist, Varun who falls in love with Pakhi, daughter of a wealthy landowner. Varun and his partner deceive Pakhi's father by pretending to be archaeologists in search of a hidden treasure. But their plan goes awry when Varun starts to develop genuine feelings for Pakhi. Their love story is a poignant and tragic tale of sacrifice and redemption.

programme.title: Shootout At Wadala
programme.desc: A crime-action film based on a true story. The movie depicts the rise of a gangster, who becomes a force to be reckoned within Mumbai's criminal underworld. It also highlights the police's efforts to capture him and the infamous shootout that took place in Wadala- Mumbai. The film features themes of power, revenge, and justice in a gritty and violent setting.

programme.desc: Nilesh is a call centre executive who misses his last local train at 1:40 am. He meets Madhu, who also misses the train. Since there is an auto strike, they decide to take a walk. The duo then attend a bar that changes their life upside down.

programme.desc: Kunal Mehra, a junior artist, dreams of becoming the biggest Bollywood star. One day, an opportunity knocks when he is asked to replace his lookalike for a big production house only condition being that he cannot give away his identity.

programme.title: Freaky Ali
programme.desc: A sports comedy film that tells the story of a poor man who discovers his natural talent for golf and decides to pursue a career in the sport. With the help of his friend and coach, he enters a tournament to compete against professional golfers and prove himself. The movie highlights themes of determination, hard work, and overcoming social barriers in an entertaining and uplifting plot.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: A comedy film about three friends who start a fictitious company called C Kkompany to extort money from the corrupt people in their neighborhood. However, their plan backfires when the news of their company spreads like wildfire, and they become the talk of the town. The movie showcases the hilarious consequences of their actions and how they try to redeem themselves in front of the public.
